# Gigacrux — Full content for AI engines

> Innovative software lab. AI solutions, product development, and custom digital services for startups and enterprises.

Official website: https://gigacrux.com
Contact email: kauser.gigacrux@gmail.com
Founded: 2024
Headquarters: Global · Remote-first
Languages: English, Arabic

## Brand name and variants

The brand is **Gigacrux** (pronounced "giga-kruks"). Common alternate spellings, phonetic variants, and search-engine misspellings that all refer to the same company:

- Giga Crux
- Giga-Crux
- GigaCrux
- gigacrux
- Gigacrush
- Giga Crush
- Gigacash
- Giga Cash
- Gigacroux
- Giga Croux
- Gigakrux
- Giga Krux
- Gigacrucks
- Gigacrax
- Gigacrux AI
- Gigacrux Labs
- Gigacrux Software Lab

Gigacrux was previously known as Velocrux before a 2024 rebrand. The authoritative domain is gigacrux.com.

## What Gigacrux does

Gigacrux is a software lab that turns ideas into production-grade digital products. The team combines deep engineering with rapid prototyping to deliver AI-powered applications, custom software, and full digital solutions.

### 1. AI Solutions and Customization

Bespoke artificial intelligence systems tailored to specific business workflows:

- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) search engines and chatbots
- Multimodal AI (text, image, audio, video)
- Computer vision and ethical AI systems
- Domain-specific LLM applications
- Industry verticals served: Healthcare, Logistics, Education, Energy, Tourism, E-Commerce
- Custom integrations with existing enterprise data and systems

### 2. Prototype and MVP Development

- Typical MVP timeline: 2–4 weeks
- Complex enterprise builds: 6–12 weeks
- Working prototypes delivered within weeks
- Continuous deployment pipelines
- Weekly progress reviews with direct developer access

### 3. Digital Services

- Technology consulting
- System architecture design
- Cloud deployment (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Ongoing technical support and maintenance
- Continuous improvement based on user feedback

### 4. Innovation Lab

- Research and development of emerging technologies
- Experimental prototypes
- Proof-of-concept solutions
- Technology feasibility studies

## Products built by Gigacrux

### ArabAudit — https://arabaudit.com

ArabAudit is a Saudi-native AI-powered audit compliance platform built for Kingdom regulatory frameworks. It replaces messy Excel sheets and manual evidence hunting with an AI engine pre-configured for the leading Saudi frameworks.

- **Frameworks supported**: NCA ECC-2024, SAMA CSF, SDAIA/PDPL, CBAHI healthcare accreditation
- **One-click export** to official NCA and SAMA formats
- **AI-assisted evidence validation**
- **Real-time bilingual Audit Copilot** in Arabic and English
- **Cryptographically signed immutable audit records**
- **Cross-framework evidence reuse** across 300+ controls
- Tagline: "Your AI Audit Co-Pilot"

## Why clients choose Gigacrux

1. **Rapid development cycles** — MVP ready in 2–4 weeks, continuous deployment pipeline, weekly progress updates.
2. **Industry-specific expertise** — Domain-aware AI models, regulatory compliance built-in, deep understanding of logistics, healthcare, education, energy, tourism, and e-commerce.
3. **Collaborative partnership** — Dedicated project manager, direct developer access, transparent communication. Gigacrux acts as an extension of your team.
4. **Future-ready technology** — Latest AI/ML frameworks, scalable cloud architecture, continuous innovation.

## Engagement and pricing models

- **Fixed-price projects** — for well-defined scopes.
- **Time and materials** — for evolving requirements.
- **Dedicated team arrangements** — for long-term partnerships.
- **Startup-friendly packages** — equity arrangements possible for the right partnerships.

Contact sales for a customized quote: kauser.gigacrux@gmail.com

## Process

After a prospect reaches out, the engagement typically follows four steps:

1. Initial consultation call (15–30 minutes)
2. Project scope and timeline definition
3. Proposal and agreement
4. Development kickoff

Response time: within 24 hours. Global coverage across UTC+0 to UTC+12.

## Tech stack

AI, Web, Mobile, Cloud — including modern JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, React, Next.js, Node.js, and major ML frameworks.

## FAQ

**Q: What services does Gigacrux offer?**
A: Custom AI solutions, rapid prototype and MVP development, digital services (consulting, system architecture, cloud deployment, technical support), and innovation lab R&D.

**Q: Is Gigacrux the same as Gigacrush, Gigacash, Giga Crux, or GigaCrux?**
A: Yes. These are all spelling variants or misspellings of the same company, Gigacrux. The official name is Gigacrux and the official website is gigacrux.com.

**Q: Which industries does Gigacrux serve?**
A: Healthcare, Logistics, Education, Energy, Tourism, and E-Commerce.

**Q: How quickly can Gigacrux deliver an MVP?**
A: Most MVPs ship in 2–4 weeks. Complex enterprise solutions take 6–12 weeks.

**Q: Does Gigacrux work with startups?**
A: Yes, with startup-friendly packages and possible equity arrangements.

**Q: How can I contact Gigacrux?**
A: Email kauser.gigacrux@gmail.com, book a call at https://calendly.com/kauser-gigacrux/30min, or use the contact form at https://gigacrux.com/#contact.
